event: Requiem for Mobile Telephones — Street Performance
description: An outdoor street scene viewed from above. A young woman in a pink ballet tutu performs a high kick at center, surrounded by several people on the ground working with materials or canvases. A crowd of onlookers stands in a semicircle watching. The setting appears to be a European city sidewalk or plaza on a sunny day. Mobile phones and dark objects are spread on a cloth on the ground.
